---
title: "William Fowlie"
---

## William Fowlie

**Dates:** (b.1791/2)

### Description

Sir William Heathcote’s steward

### Biography

  Born in Scotland, he had a wife Maria Augusta 46 and niece Isabella Davidson 22 in 1851 census.  He had retired by 1861 and was living in Shirley Common Road, Millbrook parish. [Awdry, <i>Heathcote</i>;  White <i>Directory of Hampshire</i> 1859; 1851 census]

### Letters

- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
